name: Wizard of OZ: Hidden Objects
short_description: Join a captivating and bright adventure through the land of Oz! Search for hidden clues with your favourite characters and defeat the evil witch!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the magical land of the Wizard of Oz!

Beloved story combined with original design and various hidden challenges will keep you captivated all along! Meet Dorothy, The Tin Man and Cowardly Lion to help them to resist the Witch of the West.

Our Features:

- Variety of challenges: search by silhouettes, spot the differences and jigsaw puzzles! You can switch between the modes and choose what you enjoy the most.

- Bright handmade design creating a unique atmosphere!

- Colourful scenes with your favourite characters!

- Family-friendly!

Good luck on your way, and remember, hidden clues can be everywhere!

supported_languages: French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, English
